resources.string: Compact widget with your latest cosmic morning brief.
Shows today\'s moon phase, guidance, and personal day number.
Daily cosmic summary with personal day, vibe, and key guidance bullets.
Shows the current ruling planetary hour and countdown to the next.
Keep the main shell legible without leaving Profile. These settings apply across the Android app immediately.
Boost supporting-text contrast across cards, diagnostics, and secondary labels.
Scale app typography upward for easier reading while keeping the same layout structure.
Mirror the iOS language list and persist the selected locale across launches.
Daily reading reminders need notification access so AstroNumeric can deliver your morning brief at the time you choose.
Moon event alerts need notification access so AstroNumeric can surface new-moon and full-moon moments without forcing you to open the app.
Habit reminders need notification access so AstroNumeric can nudge you when your local ritual list still has open items for the day.
Timing alerts need notification access so AstroNumeric can send one focused daily timing nudge instead of making you manually check the screen.
Transit alerts need notification access so AstroNumeric can warn you about upcoming exact aspects and scheduled transit windows.
Alert preferences were saved locally but backend sync failed.
Signed-in alert preferences could not be refreshed.
Notification permission is required before alerts can be enabled.
Android now has the first native background pipeline for alerts and widgets.
A WorkManager refresh runs every few hours, updates the morning brief widget cache, and can deliver daily brief, moon-event, and transit alerts once their local rules are met.
Delivers the morning brief once during your preferred morning window and keeps the widget cache warm.
Sends a lunar alert when the refresh pipeline catches a new moon or full moon state.
Looks at your local habit list and nudges you once if today still has open rituals.
Fetches a live timing reading for your chosen activity and turns it into one daily nudge.
Checks the backend daily transit report, schedules exact local alarms for upcoming exact aspects when Android allows it, and still falls back to your preferred delivery window.
Exact transit alarms are currently off for AstroNumeric, so Android will fall back to the broader delivery window instead of minute-level alerts.
Keep proactive transit alerts scoped to stronger squares, oppositions, and tight conjunctions.
%1$s and linked this device to your signed-in account.
Push delivery was detached from this device.
Firebase is not configured in this Android app yet. Add google-services.json to enable FCM push delivery.

Personal mode is enabled for this build, matching the iOS local-first behavior. Notification preferences stay on-device, profile sync is dormant, and any stored account session is ignored until personal mode is turned off.
Stored account session cleared. Personal mode remains active.
Sign in to sync Mercury retrograde preferences with your backend account. Transit email subscriptions can still use the current local-first profile payload even before you sign in.
Backend accounts require at least 8 characters, one letter, and one number.
Signed in, but profile sync failed.
Signed in. Mercury retrograde preferences will now sync to your account
Account created, but profile sync failed.
Account created. Android alert settings are now linked to your account
Signed in as %1$s. Mercury retrograde preference changes now sync with the backend, while transit email subscriptions still work for local-first profiles.
Could not refresh backend alert settings.
Signed out. Alert settings remain available locally.
FCM is available on this build. Sync the device token to register this installation only; personal mode keeps it detached from any account session.
FCM is available on this build. Sync the device token now to register this installation, or sign in first to link it to your account.
FCM is available on this build. Sync the device token to link this installation to %1$s for backend push delivery.
This Android repo still has no Firebase app config file. Token acquisition is wired, but FCM delivery will stay inactive until google-services.json is added.
Stored locally. Personal mode keeps the backend account copy dormant in this build.
Stored locally now. Sign in above if you want the backend copy to stay in sync too.
Stored locally and synced to your backend account.
Choose a profile first. The address is still saved locally.
Personal mode stays local-first. Android will send the inline profile payload when syncing this email to the backend.
The backend can now subscribe this local-first profile payload directly, even before Android sign-in.
This will subscribe the current profile against the backend using your signed-in session when available.
Transit subscription synced with the backend for %1$s.
Transit email was saved locally, but backend subscription failed.
Imported profile is missing a name.
Imported profile needs a YYYY-MM-DD birth date.
Imported profile is missing a birthplace.
Imported profile is missing a timezone.
Sensitive details were hidden because privacy mode is enabled.
Time of birth is unknown, so exact rising sign and house precision may be reduced.

Names, birth details, and some share surfaces are masked in the UI, but server-backed features still use the profile data required to calculate results. Backup exports still contain full details so they can be restored later.
Profile details display in full inside the app. You can still export a backup, import a backup, or share a redacted summary whenever you need to control what leaves the screen.
Device privacy mode is about UI redaction, not a network kill switch.
Please describe the backend-held or device-held data question here.
Profile imported into the local Android store.
Profiles, preferences, local relationship history, habits, and journal entries are primarily stored on-device in this Android build.
Privacy mode changes how details are shown in the UI, not whether the app can still calculate charts from your saved birth data.
What can go to the backend
Server-backed readings, compatibility, synced friends, and other remote features still send the profile details needed to compute results.
Privacy mode is not a network kill switch. It is a presentation boundary and a sharing boundary.
Backup exports stay full-fidelity so a profile can be restored later, even while privacy mode is on.
Plain-text sharing can be redacted when privacy mode is enabled.
Deleting a profile removes it from the local Android store.
Questions about backend-held data such as synced friend records or notification tokens should go to privacy@astromeric.app.
This screen explains what stays local, what still reaches the backend, and how redaction changes the visible UI.
Select a profile before exporting or sharing.
Backup exports always retain full profile details so they can be restored later. Redaction affects plain-text sharing and visible labels, not the backup payload itself.
For privacy questions, deletion requests, or backend-held data concerns, email privacy@astromeric.app.
Manage local-first identity, privacy, alerts, and account state without leaving the main shell.
This build keeps the iOS-style local-first contract. Profiles stay on this device and any saved account session stays dormant while personal mode is enabled.
Profiles stay on this device until you sign in. %1$d profile(s) are currently device-only.
Shape how visible your data is, where alerts go, and whether device-only profiles ever attach to an account.
Mirror the same controls iOS exposes: how readings sound, which nudges are active, and how much optional context the guide can use.
Keep the Profile hub useful even when users need education, guidance, or a human follow-up.
Active profile ready for backup or share: %1$s
Select or create a profile before exporting, importing, or sharing a summary.
Android already ships full-fidelity export/import in Privacy. Redaction changes visible labels and text sharing, not the backup payload itself.
Profiles begin on-device and stay local unless you explicitly attach them to an account-backed flow.
Names and birth details are masked across the Android UI while calculations still use the saved profile data they need.
Profile details are currently visible in full. Open Privacy to mask names and birth details across the main UI.
Forecasts, charts, AI guidance, and alerts still use the same Railway /v2 backend surface as iOS when those features need it.
Switch the active profile, edit details, or remove an old entry from this device.
This profile still lives only on this device. Sync it to attach it to your account-backed alerts and profile storage.
Create your profile to unlock a real chart, meaningful numerology, and timing that actually belongs to you.
This profile powers your chart, numerology, timing tools, and personal guidance throughout the app.
Phase 1 already matches the iOS time-confidence rules and local persistence strategy.
Enter a city and country. Coordinates and timezone are confirmed automatically when you save, matching iOS.
Approximate times are saved and treated as estimated for rising sign and house logic.
Unknown birth time falls back to noon-style estimation, matching the iOS data-quality rules.
Name, birth date, birth place, and a valid time are required.
Could not confirm that birth place. Enter a city and country, then try again.
Find the answer fast enough that friction does not build.
Search when you know the issue. Browse by section when you need orientation or context.
Try a feature name, notification, widget, chart, or privacy keyword.
Email support and include the screen, feature, and steps you were taking. No birth date, birth time, birthplace, journal text, or chart data is added automatically.
How do I create a profile?
Go to the Profile tab and tap Create Profile. Enter your name, birth date, birth time if known, and birthplace. The more accurate your data, the more precise your readings.
Yes. Use the New profile action in Profile to add another person. Switch between profiles with a single tap from the profile list.
I don\'t know my birth time. What should I do?
Use the profile form to mark the time as unknown or approximate. Sun sign and numerology remain accurate, while Rising sign and house placements become estimated when the time is not exact.
How do I edit my birth details?
Open Profile, pick the profile you want, then tap Edit. Saving recalculates the profile-backed readings automatically.
How do I delete my data?
Delete a profile from the profile list to remove it from the local Android store. For backend-held data such as push tokens or synced friend records, email privacy@astromeric.app.
What does Hide Sensitive Details do?

It masks names, birth details, share cards, and some cached labels across the UI. It does not remove the underlying data needed for chart calculations, and backup files still retain full details for restore.
Why does my reading look the same as yesterday?
If you are seeing cached data, pull down on the screen to force a refresh. Readings update each day, so the content will stay the same until the date or refreshed data changes.
How accurate are the astrological calculations?
AstroNumeric uses Swiss Ephemeris calculations. Planetary positions are precise, but Rising sign and house accuracy still depend on how exact the birth time is.
Pythagorean is the modern 1 to 9 system. Chaldean uses a different 1 to 8 mapping and treats 9 as sacred. Switching systems changes some name-based calculations.
My life path number seems wrong.
Check that the birth date is correct and that you have not switched numerology systems. Pythagorean and Chaldean calculations can produce different values.
Why do two people born on the same day have different astrological profiles?
Birth time and birthplace change the Ascendant and the house layout. The Sun sign may match, but the chart structure can still differ a lot.
The chart wheel isn\'t showing house lines.
House cusps require a birth time. Add one in Profile to unlock full house-based chart features.
What house system does AstroNumeric use?
The default is Placidus. You can switch to Whole Sign in the profile editor if you prefer that system.
Why is my Sun sign different from what I expected?
If you were born near a cusp, exact birth time and birthplace can shift the Sun\'s actual sign placement compared with broad pop-astrology tables.
How do I enable the daily reminder?
Use the quick toggle in Profile or open Notification settings to manage daily, moon, habit, transit, and timing alerts more precisely. Android system permission still controls delivery.
The morning brief widget shows old data.
Bring the app to the foreground with an active profile so it can refresh the latest brief and pass updated data to the widget. A short delay is still normal.
How do I add the widget?
Long press the launcher home screen, open widgets, search for AstroNumeric, and place the brief or personal day widget.
How do I add a friend for compatibility?
Go to Relationships and add a comparison profile or friend record there. The app can then calculate compatibility using synastry, numerology, and timing data.
What does the compatibility percentage mean?
The score blends synastry aspects, life path resonance, and element balance. It points to alignment and friction, not a guaranteed outcome.
My friend data disappeared after an update.
Friend records and local relationship history are handled separately. Refresh the relationships view first. If the data does not return, contact support.
The app shows unable to load errors.
Check your internet connection and retry. If the backend is temporarily unavailable, try again in a minute. If it persists, email support.
How do I clear the cache?
Most caches expire automatically. There is no one-tap full cache wipe in the current Android build, so reinstalling is the cleanest local reset.
The app crashed. How do I report it?
Relaunch the app and email support with Crash Report in the subject, your device model, Android version, and the steps that led to the crash.
Pull down to refresh. If the content is still stale, confirm connectivity and try again after the cache window expires.
Open the section that matches the question you have now instead of reading front to back.
Go to Profile and create a profile with full name, birth date, birth time if known, and birthplace. Better source data gives you better chart precision.
Birth time determines the Ascendant and house cusps. Without it, the app falls back to an estimated chart and hides some house-dependent features.
You can add more than one profile for yourself, a partner, family members, or comparison subjects and switch between them from the Profile tab.
The daily reading combines forecast scoring, your personal day number, and lunar context into a single daily interpretation. Pull to refresh on Home when you need a fresh fetch.
Morning Brief is the short summary reused across the home surface, widgets, and notifications. Opening the app helps keep it current.
This numerology value is derived from your birth date plus today\'s date and helps frame the tone of the day.
Derived from the full birth date. It represents the broad themes and core direction that repeat through life.
These name-based numbers describe how you express yourself, what drives you internally, and how you are perceived externally.
Pythagorean is the modern default. Chaldean uses a different mapping and can produce different name-based results.
These cycles are built from your birth date and the current calendar period to explain the longer and shorter timing arcs you are in.
The chart view places planets, signs, and houses into one wheel so you can inspect the structure of the natal chart and supporting interpretations.
Planets show what is acting, signs show how that energy expresses itself, houses show where it lands, and aspects show how those energies interact.
Synastry compares two charts to show resonance, friction, and recurring interaction patterns.
Relationships lets you save and compare people. Some relationship data syncs through the backend, while local history stays on-device.
Higher scores signal stronger alignment, but they do not predict the success of a relationship. They describe pattern intensity, not destiny.
The year-ahead flow uses the Sun returning to its natal position to frame your next year of themes and pressure points.
Long-cycle astrological milestones such as Saturn and Chiron periods help define your current life chapter.
The app highlights major activation periods and lays out month-by-month themes to make the longer forecast easier to use.
Some tools are direct calculations from astrology or numerology, while others are reflective or hybrid guidance layers.
These support reflection and reference use cases rather than strict natal chart computation.
Habits and Journal help you turn the readings into trackable behavior and reflection, while widgets reuse app-prepared daily context.
Manage the quick reminder from Profile or use Notification settings for more granular alert control.
The brief notification depends on successful brief refresh plus Android notification permission and delivery rules.
Use the in-app notification screen to disable categories and Android system settings to revoke permission entirely.
Main surfaces support pull-to-refresh when you want a fresh network-backed result instead of cached content.
Use the profile list actions to edit or delete saved profiles quickly.
Cosmic Guide uses your active profile plus optional local context such as calendar and biometric consent when those features are enabled.
This is a presentation privacy layer. It masks visible details and sharing surfaces without turning server-backed features off.
Numerology can switch systems so you can compare Pythagorean and Chaldean results side by side.
No birth date, birth time, birthplace, journal text, or chart data is included automatically.
Use this to sanity-check the local Android surface: permissions, Health Connect availability, and whether widget cache data has actually been seeded.
Debug-only: creates and selects a local exact-time profile with coordinates and timezone so offline Swiss fallback can be exercised on the emulator.
Select or seed a profile first.
Triggered a sample exact-transit notification using %1$s.
No saved exact transit snapshot yet. AstroNumeric will cache the next successful exact scan for offline alarm recovery.
No recent exact transit load has been recorded yet. After the next refresh, AstroNumeric will show whether transits came from backend, on-device Swiss, cache, or the local estimator.
Last exact transit refresh used %1$s at %2$s.
Calendar access was not granted. Enable it in Settings if you want calendar-aware guidance.
Calendar-aware guidance uses a redacted summary of upcoming events for context. Event titles and exact times remain on-device and are not sent from this permission request alone.
Optional. Android Cosmic Guide can use a redacted summary of upcoming events today. Titles and exact times are not sent.
Calendar context is enabled for current guide conversations.
Optional. Android Cosmic Guide can use a Health Connect snapshot when you grant consent. Raw records stay on-device and only summarized context is shared with guide prompts.
Biometric context is enabled for current guide conversations.
Turn guidance into evidence by saving what happened, how it felt, and whether the reading landed.
Create a profile first so Android can keep your reflections scoped the same way iOS does.
Journal entries stay tied to a profile, so Android needs at least one saved profile before this feature becomes useful.
Need at least three rated readings to surface patterns.
Pick a reading below, then save journal notes and an outcome back to your account.
Voice journaling uses Android speech recognition and only requests microphone access when you start a recording.
No synced readings yet. Generate guidance for this profile first, then come back here to track what landed.
No journal entries yet. Start by recording whether today\'s guidance matched the day you actually lived.
Microphone access is required for voice journaling.
Voice journaling needs microphone access only while you record. If you decline, typed journal entries still work normally.
Journal entry saved locally for this profile.
Journal entry removed from the local Android store.
Moon phase could not be loaded.
Morning brief could not be loaded.
Daily forecast could not be loaded.
Create a profile to unlock the same daily reading, moon context, and planning dashboard shape used across iOS.
Personal day, moon context, forecasts, and planning windows in one daily dashboard.
The API layer is wired but has not returned a brief yet.
The moon snapshot has not loaded yet.
Build a few habits to turn the daily forecast into something trackable. The habits workspace is already wired on Android.
Create a profile to unlock personal forecast sections, scores, and timing guidance.
Forecasts require birth time, coordinates, and timezone. The dashboard still keeps the brief and moon context live while profile quality is incomplete.
No daily forecast has been returned yet.
Jump into the same daily tool set the iOS home dashboard surfaces first.
Each shortcut opens Tools, where the live module is already loaded.
Pull a full personalized reading for today, this week, or the month ahead.
Birth chart, progressed, synastry, and composite entry points.
Personal day, moon phase, retrogrades, and cues.
Themes, energy patterns, and what to embrace across seven days.
Current lunar phase and ritual weather.
Turn the forecast into something trackable.
You can browse the shell now, but a profile is what unlocks the real dashboard: chart context, personal day, forecast sections, and timing that feels specific.
Your chart, forecast, and timing stack are ready for a proper daily read.
Health Connect access is required for biometric-aware guidance.
Health Connect needs an update before biometric-aware guidance can be enabled.
Health Connect is unavailable on this device.
Create or select a profile first so the guide can anchor its responses to the same chart and privacy contract as iOS.
Ask for pattern recognition, timing context, and chart-based perspective without leaving the native app.
The guide can use a redacted summary of upcoming events. Titles and exact times are not sent.
Optional. The guide can use a redacted summary of upcoming events. Titles and exact times are not sent.
The guide may use your read-only Health Connect snapshot when you ask for context.
Health Connect needs an update before Android can read your optional biometric context.
Health Connect is unavailable on this device, so biometric-aware guidance stays off.
Optional. The guide can use read-only Health Connect context such as heart rate, steps, calories, and sleep.
Cosmic Guide is reading the pattern...
Cosmic Guide could not answer right now.
What does my chart say about my career?
How is today looking based on transits?
What are my biggest strengths and shadows?
Tell me about my Venus placement
What should I watch out for this week?
Use structured lessons, glossary support, and sign-based orientation without routing back through Tools.
Try a different search or category.
Learning modules could not be loaded.
Zodiac guidance could not be loaded.
Use structured lessons when you want skill-building instead of a quick lookup.
Continue lessons or mark what you have completed.
Definitions for language that appears across readings and tools.
Learning content has not loaded yet.
Create or select a profile to generate a personalized reading across daily, weekly, and monthly scopes.
A birth location is required for forecast readings. Add it to your profile to unlock %1$s insights.
A confirmed birth time and place are required for forecast readings.
The reading returned no sections. Try refreshing.
Weekly vibe could not be loaded.
Create or select a profile to see your weekly cosmic vibe.
Add your birth time and location to your profile for personalized weekly insights.
Relationship timing could not be loaded.
Best relationship days could not be loaded.
Relationship events could not be loaded.
Relationship transit status could not be loaded.
Relationship phases could not be loaded.
Relationship timeline could not be loaded.
Synced friends could not be loaded.
Friend compatibility could not be loaded.
Keep synced friends, saved compatibility history, and live relationship timing in one place instead of routing that depth through Tools.
Create or select a profile first so compatibility, Cosmic Circle, and relationship timing can personalize correctly.
Save a compatibility result to build a reusable relationship history.
Select a primary profile before calculating compatibility.
Choose a second profile to load compatibility.
Enter the second person and run the comparison.
No secondary saved profiles yet. Use manual entry to compare someone new.
Manual comparisons save into local relationship history using a private synthetic id derived from the entered name and date.
Select a profile before managing synced friends.
Friends added here are stored through the backend and ranked separately from your on-device relationship history.
Compatibility rankings are not available yet.
Sign timing: no second profile selected
Live timing and timeline cues below are calculated for this profile pair.
Live timing below currently uses the active profile sign only until you choose a second profile.
A profile is needed to view your Cosmic Circle.
Add people whose birth data you know to see cosmic compatibility rankings.
A profile is needed to consult the oracle.
Frame a clear yes or no question and let the sky weigh in.
Will this decision serve me well?
The live request failed, so Android is showing the last saved on-device Swiss chart.
The live request failed, so Android is showing the last saved backend chart.
Calculated on this device with bundled Swiss Ephemeris data.
Estimated on this device from local fallback data.
Fetched from the live AstroNumeric backend.
The chart source could not be determined.
Read the natal structure first, then branch into timing or compatibility when the base pattern is clear.
Use numbers as a parallel system for identity, timing, and motivation instead of treating them like detached trivia.
Move from general chemistry into relationship timing and aspect-level comparison when you need more precision.
Choose the chart layer that matches the question: year-ahead timing, inner development, or relational structure.
Default Western system with familiar 1-9 number reduction.
Older 1-8 system that shifts name-number emphasis and tone.
Numerology profile could not be loaded.
See your structure, not just isolated symbols. Move between birth chart, numerology, compatibility, and advanced timing without losing the thread.
%1$s is moving through a **Life Path %2$d** story. The current year emphasizes **%3$s** through Personal Year %4$d.
Pick **one focus area** from this Personal Year and pair it with **one Life Path strength** you can practice consistently this week.
Switch methods when you want a different lens on name-based emphasis, but keep the result connected to the profile\'s chart story.
Select or create a profile before calculating numerology.
Use the summary as the glue between your core numbers and the current cycle.
The explanation flow matches iOS more closely: try the backend explanation, then keep a structured local synthesis if the request is unavailable.
Life Path sets the main arc; Destiny and current cycles tell you how it is being expressed now.
This is the stable through-line behind the changing cycle numbers.
This section turns the present year into practical focus areas instead of vague themes.
Treat these as timing accents, not substitutes for the rest of the reading.
This is where the reading becomes actionable instead of just descriptive.
Pinnacles show major phases; challenges show the lessons likely to repeat inside them.
This mirrors the iOS flow more closely: try the backend explanation first, then keep a deterministic local fallback if the request cannot complete.
Birth chart could not be loaded.
This dedicated flow mirrors iOS more closely: read the big three first, then move into placements, aspects, houses, and a portable chart summary.
Select or create a profile before opening the birth chart.
Add birthplace coordinates and timezone to unlock the natal chart detail flow.
Read this first so you know where the chart is exact and where it is estimated.
These placements show what part of you is speaking and the sign shows how it speaks.
Aspects tell you where energies reinforce each other, clash, or create useful tension.
Houses show where each part of the chart tends to play out in real life.
Start with the chart identity before diving into the technical layers.
These are the fastest anchors for identity, emotional pattern, and presentation.
Android prefers the live backend for natal charts, then falls back to on-device Swiss or a saved snapshot so the chart remains readable.
Select or create a profile before requesting chart data.
Add birthplace coordinates and timezone to unlock natal chart calculations. Birth time is optional and will fall back to noon-style estimation.
Use the studio tab for orientation, then open the full chart flow for a dedicated detail and export surface.
Read the calculation context before interpreting placements.
The dedicated detail flow carries the full placement list, export actions, and a more iOS-like reading order.
Houses tell you where each theme is landing in lived experience.
These are the strongest internal tensions and harmonies in the natal pattern.
Compatibility is more useful when it explains where connection is easy, where friction is productive, and where effort is required.
Select your primary profile to compare relationships.
Go to the broader compatibility workspace for romantic, friendship, and timing tools.
Calculate a compatibility score now — pick a mode, choose a person, get results, and save.
When both people have chart-ready data, move straight into aspect-level comparison.
Pick the layer that matches the question instead of forcing every question through the natal chart alone.
Returns explain the year, progressions explain inner development, synastry explains contact, and composite explains the relationship itself.
Read your personal year, solar return framing, and monthly themes in one dedicated flow.
Open the dedicated progression flow instead of loading a compact summary inside the studio.
Add birthplace coordinates and timezone to unlock progressed chart calculations.
Move into a dedicated aspect-level comparison between two chart-ready profiles.
Finish the primary profile\'s birth coordinates and timezone first.
See the relationship\'s shared chart in its own flow instead of a compressed card.
Progressed chart could not be loaded.
Use this view when you need inner development and long-form timing, not just the natal snapshot.
Select or create a profile before loading progressions.
Ground the progression in the natal profile before interpreting movement.
These placements show how your natal potential is unfolding over time.
Look for the relationships that keep repeating across the current chapter.
Synastry chart could not be loaded.
Use synastry when you need to see where two charts support, trigger, or challenge each other.
Select your primary profile before comparing charts.
Add another saved profile to unlock synastry comparisons.
Both profiles need birthplace coordinates and timezone before synastry can calculate cleanly.
Use this summary to separate chemistry, friction, and practical advice.
These are the main energetic contact points between both charts.
Composite chart could not be loaded.
Composite charts describe the shared field created by two people, not just each person separately.
Select your primary profile before building a composite chart.
Add another saved profile to build a composite chart.
Both profiles need birthplace coordinates and timezone before the composite chart can calculate cleanly.
Start with the chart identity before reading the planet blend.
These placements describe the relationship\'s tone, focus, and pressure points.
Yes or no guidance using your current profile context and daily signal.
Choose the best window for a date, interview, meeting, or launch.
Long-range forecast from your solar return and numerology cycle.
Your current cycle interpreted inside the fuller year-ahead forecast.
Read the current moon phase, daily guide, ritual weather, and supportive cues in one place.
Jump to the chart screen when you want placements, houses, and aspects instead of daily guidance.
Use structured lessons when you want guided understanding instead of quick lookup.
Open term definitions fast when a reading introduces language you want clarified.
Start with your sign summary when you want a fast orientation layer before going deeper.
Track practices that align with moon phases and reflection cycles.
Habits now supports local-first tracking with backend sync attempts.
Capture outcomes against readings so the app becomes more useful over time.
Journal now mirrors the local-first personal mode from iOS.
Manage your synced people and see who ranks strongest right now.
Compare either a saved profile or a manually entered second person.
Review your local relationship history alongside timing, events, and phase guidance.
Start with the category that matches whether you need a tool, lesson, practice, or relationship view.
Create a profile first so Explore can route you into personalized tools and learning.
Use Tools when you want to decide, interpret, or act on something concrete today.
Use Learn when you want structured understanding, glossary support, or sign-based orientation.
Use Habits when you want repeatable practice, lunar timing cues, and local-first completion tracking.
Use Relationships when you want live comparison, synced people, or timing context around connection.
No curated items match this search yet.
This Android slice is staged next.
A profile is needed to personalise your affirmation.
Tarot card could not be drawn.
Draw a card to receive a symbolic reflection for today.

Create or select a profile to load your personalized daily features.
Nothing loaded yet. Tap refresh to try again.
Moon events could not be loaded.
Track new moons, full moons, and phase milestones over the next two months.
Timing advice could not be loaded.
Use your energy when the sky is actually helping.
Pick one activity and read the score, best windows, watch-outs, and practical tips before you commit the moment.
Timing advice is for entertainment and planning only, not medical, legal, or financial advice.
Create or select a profile to personalize timing windows from your chart and current transits.
Select an activity first, then use the score and windows to decide whether to move now, later, or not today.
No tips returned for this activity.
Calculated tools help you decide. Interpretive tools help you feel, frame, or process what the day is bringing.
Create a profile to personalize timing, daily guidance, and reflections.
Daily guide could not be loaded.
A saved profile is required for personalized daily guidance.

A saved profile is required for personalized timing advice.
Timing advice has not loaded yet.

Ask a yes or no question
A saved profile is required for Oracle guidance.
Ask a clear question about timing, readiness, or whether to proceed.
No tarot card has been drawn yet.
A saved profile is required for personalized affirmation text.
Affirmation text has not loaded yet.
Compatibility, saved matches, live relationship timing, timeline context, and Cosmic Circle now live in a dedicated destination instead of duplicating that depth inside Tools.
Create or select a profile first so the relationship workspace can personalize comparisons and timing.
Open the relationship workspace when you want to compare profiles, revisit saved matches, or manage synced people.
Learn, habits, relationships, and themed browsing without making Explore a root tab.
Personal day, moon phase, retrogrades, and cues.
Activity windows scored from the live sky.
Overlay the next 48 hours with calendar context and timing weather.
Ask a clear yes or no question and read the guidance.
Supportive language tuned to today\'s mood.
Current lunar phase and ritual weather.
Upcoming new moons, full moons, and milestones.
Current life phase and the next 12 months.
Relationship timing, saved history, and Cosmic Circle.
Gemstone guide matched to sign traditions.
Lessons, glossary terms, and sign guidance in one reference path.
Moon phase could not be loaded.
Moon ritual could not be loaded.
Upcoming moon events could not be loaded.
Read the lunar weather before you decide how to use your energy. This destination now owns both the phase read and the ritual layer, matching the way iOS treats them as one lunar workflow.
Use the lunar weather to choose a ritual focus.
Use these to see when the next lunar shifts will change the tone.

Overlay the next 48 hours with your calendar and live timing weather. This Android version stays honest about its inputs: event titles and locations remain on-device, while timing guidance comes from the same shared backend the rest of the app uses.
Temporal Matrix reads the next 48 hours from your device calendar so it can compare event timing against the live sky. Event titles and exact locations stay on this phone.
The Temporal Matrix reads your next 48 hours directly from the device calendar so it can compare event timing against the live sky. Titles and exact locations stay local to this phone.
Temporal Matrix could not read your upcoming events.
No Events in the Next 48 Hours
Your schedule is open. Use the free space intentionally instead of treating it as empty by default.

Timing weather is inferred from the event title, its time window, and the shared timing endpoint. When the app cannot classify an event cleanly, it falls back to a meeting-style timing read instead of pretending to know more.
This event lands inside one of the stronger %1$s windows.
Timing reads %1$s. If this event can move, bias it toward %2$s.
Timing reads %1$s for %2$s. Keep expectations realistic and reduce extra friction around the edges.
No personalized timing read was available for this event, so treat the current %1$s phase as the broader weather.
No live timing overlay was available for this event.
Year ahead forecast could not be loaded.
See the shape of the year before it arrives one month at a time. Start with the larger arc, then use the monthly highlights to pace what you push, protect, or reconsider.
Create or select a profile to generate the long-range forecast and fold your current life phase into the same annual arc.
Year Ahead is less precise without an exact birth time. Solar return and house-level themes may be approximate until your birth details are complete.
Watch these windows closely. They mark turning points that can reframe the pace and priority of the year.
These are the chart points the eclipses touch most directly.
These sign changes show where the broader weather shifts during the year.
Use these as the annual frame before you optimize smaller decisions.
Treat this as pacing guidance for the entire cycle, not one good day or one bad week.
Select a year or refresh to load the annual forecast.
This matches the iOS flow more closely: you can read the annual explanation in a dedicated surface and regenerate it without leaving the forecast.
Your **Personal Year %1$d** sets the tone for %2$d. Focus on **%3$s**.
Pick **one theme** and choose **one small habit** you can repeat weekly. Use the monthly highlights to plan around it.
Your profile unlocks the symbolic layer. Create a profile to match your sign with stones, meanings, and practical ways to use them.
Use symbolic materials as a personal ritual language. This turns birthstones from trivia into something intentional: what they mean, how they resonate with your sign, and how to work with them.
Your birthstones carry energies that resonate with your sign. Use them for intention, protection, and amplifying your natural gifts.
You do not need to buy gemstones. Visualizing their colors during meditation can still activate the symbolic layer you want to work with.
Tracked locally or synced from backend.
Habit sync is unavailable, so Android is showing your cached habits.
Track repeatable practices locally first, then sync with the backend when the habits service answers.
Habits works without a saved profile, but profile context still matters for future parity layers.
%1$s fits the current lunar rhythm better than starting from zero.
Habit sync failed, so the app restored the previous state.
Habit saved locally and synced when possible.
Habit was saved locally because remote sync is unavailable.
Local-first cache stays readable even when backend sync is unavailable.
No habits yet. Start with a small ritual that matches %1$s energy.
Habit removed from the local Android cache.
Biometric-aware guidance is optional. When enabled, AstroNumeric can read a small set of health signals to add context to Cosmic Guide.
Current Android support is read-only and limited to heart rate, resting heart rate, steps, total calories burned, and sleep. This data stays optional and does not block normal app use.
You control this consent from the app and from Android settings. You can disconnect it any time.
AstroNumeric only requests read-only health access when you explicitly enable biometric-aware guidance.

The Android build currently uses health context only to enrich Cosmic Guide responses with broad signals like heart rate, steps, calories, and sleep. It does not write health data, and core app features continue working when this access stays off.
You can revoke Health Connect permissions at any time in system settings. Health context is optional and never required for charts, readings, habits, or journaling.
Add your birth details once so Home, Charts, and timing can feel personal instead of generic. You can also explore first and create it later from Profile.
Your first profile stays on this device unless you later choose account sync.
The same profile powers Charts, daily guidance, and timing tools.
You can skip this and browse the shell first, then create your profile when ready.
AstroNumeric can now combine your chart, core numbers, and daily timing into personal guidance.
Your core chart signature starts with your birth date.
Your emotional rhythm will appear after chart sync.
Your core numerology theme will appear from your birth date.
Start with the same local-first profile contract used on iOS so charts, numerology, and timing can stay aligned.
Pick a mode, choose a person, and see your cosmic score. Save the result to build your relationship history.
Switch between saved profiles and manual entry. Romantic and friendship modes use different astrology weighting.
Personal astrology and numerology that stays private, works offline, and grows with you.
AstroNumeric combines chart astrology, numerology, compatibility, and daily timing into one private workspace.
Full natal chart with planets, aspects, progressions, and synastry. Powered by Swiss Ephemeris for precision offline calculations.
Pythagorean and Chaldean methods, life path synthesis, lucky timing, and AI-powered personal explanation.
Romantic and friendship compatibility scores with dimension breakdown, strengths, and saved relationship history.
Planetary hours, moon phases, year-ahead transits, and a morning brief — personalized to your chart and life path.
Add your birth details once. Charts, numerology, and timing stay personal and private — stored only on this device.
Skip for now — I\'ll add this later
Allow notifications so AstroNumeric can deliver daily insights, moon phase reminders, and your morning brief at the right time.
Your personal planetary weather at the start of each day, timed to your chart.
New and full moon reminders so you never miss an energetically charged window.
AI explanations, unlimited readings, cloud sync, and advanced chart features — all in one private workspace.
Thank you for your support. All premium features are active on this device.
AI-powered birth chart and numerology explanations
Unlimited daily readings and cosmic guide sessions
Cloud sync and multi-device profile backup
Advanced progressions, returns, and synastry charts
Full compatibility studio with saved relationship history
Transit alerts, planetary hours, and timing intelligence
Full premium access for a full year. Cancel any time.
Full premium access billed monthly. Cancel any time.
One-time purchase. Premium access forever, no subscription.
Subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage subscriptions in Google Play.
Could not load subscription plans. Check your internet connection and try again.
All premium features are unlocked on this device. Manage your subscription in Google Play.
